title: Paylaşan Tavşan Pamuk
description: Paylaşmanın güzelliğini keşfeden sevimli bir tavşanın dostluk hikayesı.
style: 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: a fluffy white rabbit with long soft ears, pink nose, bright blue eyes, and a small cotton tail, wearing a tiny green vest
characterDescription.notes: Beyaz, uzun kulaklı, pembe burunlu, mavi gözlü, küçük yeşil yelekli sevimli tavşan

scenes.title: Tavşan Pamuk
scenes.text:
Pamuk adında beyaz bir tavşan varmış.
Ormanın kenarında, küçük bir bahçede yaşarmış.
Pamuk'un bahçesinde en güzel havuçlar yetişirmiş.
scenes.prompt: A fluffy white rabbit with long soft ears, pink nose, bright blue eyes, and a small cotton tail, wearing a tiny green vest, standing proudly in a beautiful vegetable garden full of orange carrots growing in rows. A small cozy burrow house in the background. Forest edge visible. Flowers and butterflies. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel green background with subtle carrot and leaf patterns, gentle garden watercolor texture, warm and inviting atmosphere, children's book illustration style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Havuç Toplama
scenes.text:
Bir gün Pamuk sepetini aldı.
Bahçesinden en güzel havuçları topladı.
"Bunlar sadece benim!" dedi kendi kendine.
scenes.prompt: A white rabbit wearing a green vest pulling big orange carrots from the garden soil and putting them in a woven basket. The basket is getting full of bright orange carrots with green tops. The rabbit looks determined and possessive. Sunny garden scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel orange background with subtle basket weave and carrot top patterns, gentle harvest watercolor texture, warm and abundant atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Sincap Fındık Geldi
scenes.text:
Tam o sırada arkadaşı Sincap Fındık geldi.
Fındık çok açmış.
"Pamuk, bana biraz yiyecek verebilir misin?" dedi üzgünçe.
scenes.prompt: A small brown squirrel with a big fluffy tail looking sad and hungry, standing in front of the white rabbit who is holding a basket full of carrots. The squirrel has pleading eyes and holds its belly. Forest path background. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, emotional scene.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel brown-green background with subtle acorn and leaf patterns, gentle forest watercolor texture, empathetic and emotional atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Pamuk Düşündü
scenes.text:
Pamuk düşündü.
Havuçlarını paylaşmak istemiyordu.
"Ben bunları çok zor yetiştirdim..." dedi içinden.
scenes.prompt: Close-up of a white rabbit with a conflicted expression, looking down at the basket of carrots then back at the sad squirrel. A thought bubble showing the rabbit working hard in the garden. Internal struggle visible on the rabbit's face. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, emotional close-up.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel warm yellow background with subtle thought bubble and question mark patterns, gentle contemplative watercolor texture, thoughtful and conflicted atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Kirpi Diken Geldi
scenes.text:
Sonra Kirpi Diken de geldi.
O da çok açmış.
"Ben de çok açım Pamuk..." dedi mahcupça.
scenes.prompt: A small cute hedgehog with brown spines and a friendly face approaching the white rabbit and squirrel. The hedgehog looks shy and hungry, rubbing its paws together. All three animals together on the garden path. Wildflowers around. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel warm brown background with subtle hedgehog spine and mushroom patterns, gentle woodland watercolor texture, compassionate and warm atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Paylaşma Kararı
scenes.text:
Pamuk'un kalbi sıkıştı.
Arkadaşlarının üzgün yüzlerine baktı.
"Gelin, havuçlarımı paylaşalım!" dedi gülümseyerek.
scenes.prompt: A white rabbit with a warm smile offering carrots from the basket to the squirrel and hedgehog. The rabbit's expression changed from selfish to generous and happy. Warm golden light around them, almost magical. The friends look up hopefully. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm golden lighting, heartwarming scene.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel warm golden background with subtle heart and sharing hand patterns, gentle magical watercolor texture with sparkles, generous and heartwarming atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Birlikte Yediler
scenes.text:
Fındık ve Diken çok sevindi!
Üçü birlikte havuçları yedi.
Hepsi çok mutluydu.
scenes.prompt: Three animal friends sitting together on the grass eating carrots happily - a white rabbit, a brown squirrel, and a small hedgehog. All smiling and laughing. Carrot pieces around them. Warm sunlight, flowers in the background. Joyful picnic scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, happy group scene.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel bright green background with subtle picnic blanket and carrot patterns, gentle joyful watercolor texture, happy and friendly atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Çilek Sürprizi
scenes.text:
Ertesi gün Fındık geldi.
Bir sepet dolusu çilek getirmişti!
"Bunları seninle paylaşmak istiyorum!" dedi.
scenes.prompt: A brown squirrel carrying a small basket overflowing with bright red strawberries, offering them to the surprised and delighted white rabbit at the garden gate. The squirrel looks proud and happy. Red ripe strawberries with green leaves. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel red-pink background with subtle strawberry and leaf patterns, gentle sweet watercolor texture, surprising and generous atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Böğürtlen Hediyesi
scenes.text:
"Bunları ormanda buldum, sizin için topladım!" dedi Fındık.
Diken de geldi.
Böğürtlenler getirmişti.
"Ben de paylaşmak istiyorum!" dedi.
scenes.prompt: All three friends together - the hedgehog arrived with a leaf plate full of dark purple blackberries. The squirrel showing strawberries, the rabbit showing carrots. Everyone sharing their food. A beautiful forest clearing with wildflowers. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, colorful food scene.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel purple-pink background with subtle berry and fruit patterns, gentle bountiful watercolor texture, abundant and sharing atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Dostluk Pikniği
scenes.text:
Üç arkadaş birlikte piknik yaptı.
Pamuk o gün öğrendi ki:
Paylaştıkça çoğalır mutluluk!
Gökyüzünde gökkuagı belirdi.
Kelebekler dans etti.
scenes.prompt: Three best friends - white rabbit, brown squirrel, and hedgehog - having a beautiful picnic on a checkered blanket with all their shared food (carrots, strawberries, blackberries). A magnificent rainbow arching across the blue sky. Colorful butterflies dancing around them. Wildflowers everywhere. Pure joy and friendship. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, magical cinematic wide shot.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel rainbow gradient background with subtle butterfly and flower patterns, gentle magical watercolor texture with sparkles, joyful and magical friendship atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🥕
facts: Tavşanlar sadece havuç yemez, ot ve sebze de severler!
Tavşanlar çok hızlı koşabilir - saatte 70 km!

funFacts.title: Orman Dostları 🌳
facts: Sincaplar kış için yiyecek saklar ama bazen nereye sakladıklarını unuturlar!
